id.description: Unique identifier for the test case

language.description: Language of the test input (fr=French, ar=Arabic, darija=Darija, en=English)

input.description: The prompt or scenario provided to the AI

context.description: Additional context required for the test (e.g., patient profile, current medications)

severity.description: Severity level of the test case

description.description: Human-readable description of what this test case verifies

expected_contains.description: RAG grounded cases: substrings a grounded answer must contain (case-insensitive)

must_not_contain.description: Substrings the answer must never contain (e.g. a fabricated dosage)
